meaning: adj.女灶神的,贞洁的,处女的n.处女,修女
examples: Vestal virgins. I can see them.
Thee Vestal Virgins lived at the Forum as well.
Vestal looked up to see Belfred crooking a finger from the half darkness of the hall.
Emergency managers in Broome County, New York, reported people trapped inside a home because of downed trees in the town of Vestal.
